name: One Big Table for BI
description: Pre-join all dimensions into a single flat OBT and create a monthly revenue view on top

checks.name: sales_obt has 6 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM sales_obt;
checks.description: One row per fact_sales row (grain preserved)

checks.name: No NULL customer or product names
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM sales_obt WHERE customer_name IS NULL OR product_name IS NULL;
checks.description: All dimension attributes must be fully populated

checks.name: January Electronics revenue
checks.query: SELECT ROUND(total_revenue, 2) AS total_revenue FROM v_monthly_category_revenue WHERE month = 1 AND product_category = 'Electronics';

checks.name: Monthly category revenue view has 3 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM v_monthly_category_revenue;
checks.description: 3 distinct (year, month, category) combinations: Jan Electronics, Jan Peripherals, Feb Electronics
